summary: Full e2e testing of new SAP payment flow (replaces Stripe). Backend: 14/14 pytest tests PASSED. Frontend: 4/4 critical flows PASSED including SAP URL opened in new tab, 'Almost done' toast, duplicate rejection toast, and admin pending_payment -> confirmed flip triggering BIB generation + Gmail SMTP email (log line confirmed).

issues: Section titled 'Confirmed Registrations' actually lists ALL registrations including pending_payment rows. Rename to 'All Registrations' or split into two sections to avoid confusion.

Form fields (user_name, gender, dob, user_phone, user_email, tshirt, experience, emergency_name, emergency_phone) lack data-testid attributes. Inputs have plain HTML ids which works but data-testid on the submit button ('Continue to Payment') and the 'Register & Pay Now' card button would make future tests more stable.

The 'Register & Pay Now' button wording still says 'Pay Now' even though payment now happens externally on SAP portal — the subsequent button inside the modal reads 'Continue to Payment (₹499)' which is accurate. Consider aligning the card CTA to 'Register Now' to match the new SAP flow.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid attributes to registration form fields and 'Continue to Payment' / 'Register & Pay Now' buttons for test stability.
(Optional) Rename admin section 'Confirmed Registrations' to 'All Registrations' or filter it to status=='confirmed' to match the heading.
(Optional, from iter_2) server.py is 1353 lines — still exceeds 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/register/pending duplicate check blocks same email regardless of status ('any status'). This is correct per current requirement but note: if a user tried an email, never paid, and the admin later cancels — future retries with the same email will still be blocked until the admin deletes or the status check is loosened. Consider allowing re-registration when existing row has status in ('cancelled','pending_payment' older than X hours).

PUT /api/admin/registrations/{id} transition-to-confirmed condition uses `not current.get('bib_number')` which safely prevents double-generation. Good. However the returned response key `bib_number` falls back to `update_data.get('bib_number')` which is None when the no-op path is taken without bib_number in payload — currently handled by `or current.get('bib_number','')`. Works, but a tiny cleanup (always read from DB after update) would be cleaner.

Frontend handleRegister opens a new tab BEFORE checking response.data.payment_url — actually it does check, good. But if window.open is blocked by popup blocker (e.g., Safari strict mode), user sees only toast with no indication a tab was blocked. Consider fallback: show a clickable link in the toast body to the SAP URL.

backend/.env still has STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent even though Stripe flow is no longer used from the UI. Stripe webhook & /api/payments/checkout/session endpoints still exist in server.py — dead code. Safe to remove in a follow-up.
seed_data_creation: Pytest and playwright each created TEST_* / sap_* pending_payment registrations and deleted them on teardown. DB is clean after this run (verified no residual 'sap' emails via GET /api/admin/registrations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAP payment flow is fully working. Validated endpoints: POST /api/register/pending (200 returns registration_id+payment_url+event_title+amount, 400 on duplicate, 404 on bad event). PUT /api/admin/registrations/{id} correctly transitions pending_payment->confirmed with bib_generated=true and regenerates BIB+QR+bib_card+sends email; no-op on already-confirmed; no BIB for other status changes. Regressions all green: admin login (200/401), GET /api/admin/registrations shape, manual POST /api/admin/registrations still generates BIB, POST /api/admin/registrations/{id}/send-email (200/404), POST /api/admin/registrations/{id}/checkin. Frontend: 'Register & Pay Now' on each event card -> modal with id-based form fields (#user_name, #gender, #dob, #user_phone, #user_email, #tshirt, #experience, #emergency_name, #emergency_phone + 5 checkboxes + Yes/No medical radios). Submit triggers window.open(_blank) to https://wds-prd.rvei.edu.in:4430/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/zeventregister/#/scode/RUN_KUMBHA-2026, main page stays on domain, toast 'Almost done! 🏃' appears. Admin /admin page login (password input + submit) loads dashboard with registrations table where a <select> per row flips status; flipping pending_payment->confirmed fires PUT and shows 'Status updated' success toast; BIB OSM001 generated and Gmail SMTP email confirmed via backend log line 'BIB email sent to <email> (BIB OSM001)'.
rca of the issue: N/A — no outstanding bugs from this review.
